name: Floating Search
description: Select any text on a page to bring up a floating action bar: search, copy, or open the selection as a URL. Supports five search engines (Google, DuckDuckGo, Bing, Baidu, Wikipedia) and works across SPA navigations.

configItems.name: Search engine
configItems.description: Engine used by the Search button.

configItems.name: Minimum selection length
configItems.description: Skip very short selections to avoid the bar popping up on accidental taps.

configItems.name: Open results in a new tab
configItems.description: If off, navigation replaces the current page.
